title: Transaction Logs for Digital Product Sales Explained for Digital Creators — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Selling ebooks, courses, templates, fonts, and digital downloads with automated delivery and crypto payments — no platform middleman required.

content.text: If you're a digital creator in Kenya, selling ebooks, courses, or templates, you're no stranger to the frustration of not being able to use PayPal or Stripe due to geographic restrictions. Every time you try to set up a payment system, you're met with a message saying that your country is not supported. This can be a major roadblock to getting paid for your work. You've got a valuable skill to share, but you can't even get started on collecting payments. It's time to break free from these limitations and start selling your digital products with confidence.
What This Actually Is and Why It Matters

Transaction logs are a record of all the transactions that have taken place on your store. This includes information like the date and time of the sale, the item that was sold, the price, and the payment method used. But transaction logs are more than just a record of past sales. They're a powerful tool that can help you understand your business, identify areas for improvement, and make data-driven decisions. With the Admin Dashboard, you can view transaction logs in real-time, track your sales, and analyze your performance. This means you can stay on top of your business and make informed decisions to drive growth.
How the Technology Works Under the Hood

The Admin Dashboard uses a combination of blockchain technology and a payment processor like NOWPayments to track and record transactions. When a sale is made, the payment processor sends the transaction details to the Admin Dashboard, which then updates the transaction log in real-time. This means that you can see exactly what's happening with each sale, from the moment it's made to the moment it's processed. The technology is robust and secure, giving you peace of mind and confidence in your ability to track and manage your sales.
Who This Is Built For and Why

The Admin Dashboard is built for digital creators like you, who want to sell their products without being held back by geographic restrictions or payment limitations. Whether you're selling ebooks, courses, or templates, this tool is designed to help you get paid for your work, no matter where you are in the world. With its user-friendly interface and powerful features, the Admin Dashboard is the perfect solution for anyone looking to take their business to the next level.
The Admin Dashboard is not just a tool for tracking transactions, but a powerful business management platform.
The Components That Make It Work Together

The Admin Dashboard is just one part of the Unchained Commerce ecosystem. When combined with the Core Shop Engine and Web3 Wallet Connect, you get a complete solution for selling and managing your digital products. The Core Shop Engine handles the backend of your store, automating delivery and payment verification, while the Web3 Wallet Connect provides a secure and user-friendly frontend for your customers to make payments. Together, these components work in harmony to provide a smooth and seamless experience for both you and your customers.
How to Use This Knowledge to Take Action

Now that you know how the Admin Dashboard works and why it matters, it's time to take action. Start by signing up for the Admin Dashboard and configuring it to work with your store. Next, integrate the Core Shop Engine and Web3 Wallet Connect to complete your ecosystem. With these tools in place, you'll be able to track and manage your sales, analyze your performance, and drive growth for your business. Don't let geographic restrictions or payment limitations hold you back any longer. Take the first step towards breaking free and start selling your digital products with confidence today.

With a little practice, you'll be able to navigate the interface and use the features to track and manage your sales. Don't let fear of the unknown hold you back. Sign up for the Admin Dashboard today and start selling your digital products with confidence.
By using the Admin Dashboard, you can stay on top of your business and make informed decisions to drive growth.
